samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating valid data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating valid converted data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit converted output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="flag" value="0x01">Flag signal toggles between 0 and 1.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]" type="sequential_logic">Locks the input data.</reg>
        <reg id="valid_out_reg" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">Valid output register.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out_reg" width_description="[15:0]" type="sequential_logic">Converted output register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always>
            if(!rst_n) begin
                <assignment>data_out_reg <= 16'b0;</assignment>
            end
            else if(valid_in && flag) begin
                <assignment>data_out_reg <= {data_lock, data_in};</assignment>
            end
        </always>
        <always>
            if(!rst_n) begin
                <assignment>valid_out_reg <= 2'b0;</assignment>
            end
            else if(valid_in && flag) begin
                <assignment>valid_out_reg <= 2'b1;</assignment>
            end
            else begin
                <assignment>valid_out_reg <= 2'b0;</assignment>
            end
        </always>
        <always>
            if(!rst_n) begin
                <assignment>data_lock <= 8'b0;</assignment>
            end
            else if(valid_in && !flag) begin
                <assignment>data_lock <= data_in;</assignment>
            end
        </always>
        <assignment>valid_out = valid_out_reg[1];</assignment>
        <assignment>data_out = data_out_reg;</assignment>
    </implementation>
</module>
